review_reason: PB Barfry → IFPA matador is non-obvious. Verify before promoting.
PB Catacomb → IFPA smoke. Unusual semantic distance. Verify.
PB PLO → IFPA magellan. PLO commonly = Paradox Leg-Over which IFPA has as a different slug. Verify.
Likely TYPO of "Sidewalk" which is a DISTINCT canonical trick. DO NOT add as alias to ripwalk; reject as typo unless curator confirms.
PB Tapdown → IFPA atomic-butterfly. Non-obvious. Memory mentions pigbeater=atomic-butterfly was added; tapdown may parallel. Verify.
